title: Fix: Remove all pricing information from service cards on Services page

requirements.summary: Remove all pricing information from service cards on Services page
acceptanceCriteria: No rupee amounts, price numbers, or currency symbols are visible on any service card on the Services page.
No pricing badge, 'Starting at', 'From', or similar price-indicating label is rendered on any card.
All service cards that previously showed pricing now show a dot '•' or have the pricing element removed entirely.
The change applies to all service categories: internet browsing, computer rental, government document services, printing, photocopying, lamination, and any other listed services.
The visual layout and card structure remains intact after removing pricing text.

file_operations.description: Remove all pricing/cost text from every service card. Replace any price values, pricing badges, rate text (e.g., '₹20/hour', 'Starting at ₹X', etc.) with a neutral dot placeholder ('•') or remove them entirely. Ensure no monetary values, rupee symbols, or price-related labels remain visible. Preserve the existing card layout and structure while eliminating all cost-related strings from internet browsing, computer rental, government document services, printing, photocopying, lamination, and any other service categories.
